ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_risk_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire risk index entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "ffmc" REAL /* Fine Fuel Moisture Code (FFMC) */,
  "dmc" REAL /* Duff Moisture Code (DMC) */,
  "dc" REAL /* Drought Code (DC) */,
  "isi" REAL /* Initial Spread Index (ISI) */,
  "bui" REAL /* Buildup Index (BUI) */,
  "fwi" REAL /* Fire Weather Index (FWI) */,
  "fire_risk_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fire risk level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indices were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indices were last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used to calculate the indices */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_risk_indices_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_risk_indices_fire_risk_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_risk_level_id") REFERENCES fire_risk_levels ("risk_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of forest coverage in the region */,
  "last_fire_incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the last fire incident in the region */,
  "fire_fighter_count" INTEGER /* Number of fire fighters assigned to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_risk_levels" (
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire risk level */,
  "risk_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the fire risk level (e.g., not fire, low risk, high risk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fire risk level */,
  "threshold_ffmc" REAL /* Threshold value for FFMC to classify the risk level */,
  "threshold_dmc" REAL /* Threshold value for DMC to classify the risk level */,
  "threshold_dc" REAL /* Threshold value for DC to classify the risk level */,
  "threshold_isi" REAL /* Threshold value for ISI to classify the risk level */,
  "threshold_bui" REAL /* Threshold value for BUI to classify the risk level */,
  "threshold_fwi" REAL /* Threshold value for FWI to classify the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire incident */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the incident occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fire incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fire incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fire incident */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the incident */,
  "fire_size" REAL /* Size of the fire in hectares */,
  "fire_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the fire (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "fire_type" TEXT /* Type of fire (e.g., forest fire, grassland fire) */,
  "causes" TEXT /* Likely causes of the fire (e.g., lightning, human activity) */,
  "containment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fire was fully contained */,
  "damages" TEXT /* Description of any damages caused by the fire */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries caused by the fire */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths caused by the fire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_incidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_fighters" (
  "fire_fighter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire fighter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the fire fighter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fire fighter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fire fighter */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the fire fighter is based */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., available, on duty, off duty) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the fire fighter */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training */,
  "next_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_fighter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_fighters_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_fighter_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire incident */,
  "fire_fighter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire fighter assigned to the incident */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, completed, in progress) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the assignment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the assignment */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Total hours worked on the assignment */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the fire fighter for the assignment (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_fighter_assignments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES fire_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_fighter_assignments_fire_fighter_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_fighter_id") REFERENCES fire_fighters ("fire_fighter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_risk_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for fire prevention and management based on the report */,
  "safety_measures" TEXT /* Safety measures recommended for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_risk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
